name: Prawn Kabobs with Peanut Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Alternate prawns, pea pods, and olives on bamboo skewers.
2. In a bowl, combine the sherry, soy sauce, peanut butter, sugar, vegetable oil, and minced garlic. Mix well to create the peanut sauce.
3. Grill or broil the kabobs for 6 to 10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the prawns turn pink and opaque. Brush the prawns frequently with the peanut sauce during cooking.
4. (Optional) Substitute 2 whole boned and skinned chicken breasts for the prawns. Cut each breast into 6 pieces and skewer them with pea pods and olives. Grill or broil these for 10 minutes, turning occasionally, until fully cooked.
